# mailcow_recipient_map (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_recipient_map" "redirect" {
  old_address = "old@example.com"
  new_address = "new@example.com"
  active      = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `new_address` (String) The address that should receive the rewritten mail
- `old_address` (String) The address whose incoming mail should be rewritten

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this recipient map entry is active

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
